payload.answer: The statements 'Sara is my daughter' and 'Sara is my niece' are mutually exclusive when attributed to the same speaker, as one cannot be both the daughter and niece of the same person under standard kinship definitions.

entity_resolution.reason: Entity 'Sara' is consistent across both statements; conflict arises from incompatible familial roles (daughter vs. niece) attributed to the same entity by the same speaker.

details: Conflict identified: direct contradiction in familial role assignment.
Entity 'Sara' resolved consistently; conflict is relational, not referential.
